agricultural.title: Agricultural Automation System

pentest.title: Enterprise Security Audit

sales.title: AI Sales Agent
sales.description: Intelligent WhatsApp chatbot that automates 80% of sales inquiries.

coparenting.title: SaaS Legal Platform
coparenting.description: Full-stack SaaS platform for pro-se parents navigating Florida family court. 41 production pages, 4 interactive legal tools, Stripe subscription billing with 4 tiers, admin dashboard, and evidence builder with PDF/Excel export.

tayco.title: Construction Company Platform
tayco.description: Corporate website for a licensed contractor operating in Wisconsin and Illinois. Full service catalog, project showcase, lead generation with WhatsApp integration, and mobile-first responsive design.

turnkey.title: Turnkey Contractor Platform
turnkey.description: Specialized platform for REO property restoration and turnkey renovations. Service quoting system, project portfolio, EPA Lead-Safe compliance showcase, and multi-region coverage.

taysupply.title: B2B Wholesale Supply Platform
taysupply.description: Wholesale sourcing platform connecting businesses with 50+ suppliers across 6 industry verticals. Quote-based pricing engine, tax-exempt purchasing, and direct-to-business fulfillment.

vulnassess.title: Security Assessment Program
vulnassess.description: Continuous vulnerability assessment program across web applications, APIs, and cloud infrastructure. OWASP Top 10 methodology, responsible disclosure, and remediation verification.

archaeonbank.title: Enterprise Banking Platform
archaeonbank.description: Production-grade banking system with PCI-DSS compliance, SOX-auditable hash-chain audit trail, AML/KYC screening, and COBOL-to-Java legacy migration. Multi-role access, loan origination, card tokenization, and real-time Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.

hero.title: AI & Automation
hero.subtitle: Transform your business with artificial intelligence. Automate processes, improve customer service and make data-driven decisions.

features.title: Intelligent Chatbots
features.description: Virtual assistants that understand context, learn from each interaction and resolve queries 24/7.

features.title: Zero-Code Automation
features.description: Connect your apps and automate workflows without writing code using n8n, Make or Zapier.

features.title: Autonomous Agents

features.title: Language Processing
features.description: Sentiment analysis, ticket classification, document information extraction.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We analyze your current processes and identify automation opportunities with highest ROI.

process.title: Solution Design
process.description: We architect the optimal solution: model selection, workflows, required integrations.

process.title: Development & Integration
process.description: We implement the solution connecting it with your existing systems (CRM, ERP, etc.).

process.description: We refine the model with your real data to maximize accuracy and relevance.

process.title: Deployment & Support
process.description: We launch to production with continuous monitoring and improvements based on real metrics.

useCases.problem: Company received 500+ daily WhatsApp inquiries, overwhelming the sales team.
useCases.solution: We implemented an AI chatbot that qualifies leads, answers FAQs and schedules meetings automatically.
useCases.result: 80% of inquiries automated, response time from 3 hours to 30 seconds, +40% conversion.

useCases.problem: Legal team spent 20+ hours weekly reviewing contracts manually.
useCases.solution: AI clause extraction system that analyzes documents and generates structured summaries.
useCases.result: 75% reduction in review time, automatic detection of risk clauses.

ctaSection.title: Ready to automate your business?
ctaSection.description: Schedule a free 30-minute consultation where we'll analyze your processes and show you concrete automation opportunities.

process.title: Architecture

process.title: QA & Testing
process.description: Unit, integration and E2E tests. Minimum 80% coverage on critical code.

process.title: Deployment

useCases.problem: Startup needed to validate marketplace idea in 6 weeks with limited budget.
useCases.solution: MVP with Next.js + Supabase: authentication, Stripe payments, seller dashboard, search.
useCases.result: Launched in 5 weeks, 200 users in first month, raised $500K seed round.

useCases.problem: Legacy PHP 5.6 system impossible to maintain, every change caused bugs.
useCases.solution: Progressive migration to Node.js microservices with API Gateway and modernized database.
useCases.result: Development time -60%, production bugs -80%, 10x scalability.

process.title: System Design

process.description: PLC programming, SCADA configuration, monitoring dashboard development.

useCases.problem: Agricultural plant lost 30% of harvest due to inefficient irrigation and undetected pests.
useCases.solution: 300+ IoT sensor network + predictive AI for automatic irrigation and early pest alerts.
useCases.result: Losses reduced to 8%, 40% water savings, ROI in 8 months.

useCases.problem: Assembly line with frequent unplanned stops due to motor failures.
useCases.solution: Vibration sensors + ML for predictive maintenance with 72h advance notice.
useCases.result: Downtime reduced 65%, equipment lifespan +25%, $200K/year savings.

ctaSection.title: Want to modernize your plant?
ctaSection.description: Schedule a free technical visit where we evaluate your operation and propose concrete improvements.

hero.title: Cybersecurity
hero.subtitle: We protect your infrastructure with professional pentesting, security audits and hardening. OWASP Top 10 as minimum standard.

features.title: Pentesting
features.description: Penetration testing on web apps, APIs, networks and cloud infrastructure.

features.title: Code Audit
features.description: Exhaustive source code review to identify vulnerabilities before deployment.

features.title: Hardening
features.description: Server, database, container and CI/CD pipeline fortification.

features.title: Compliance
features.description: OWASP, ISO 27001, SOC 2 compliance. Guided documentation and remediation.

features.title: Threat Monitoring
features.description: Intrusion detection, log analysis, real-time alerts and incident response.

features.title: Training
features.description: Security training for development teams. Secure coding practices.

process.title: Reconnaissance
process.description: We map the attack surface: domains, ports, exposed services and technologies.

process.title: Vulnerability Analysis
process.description: Automated scanning + manual testing to identify every weak point.

process.title: Controlled Exploitation
process.description: We simulate real attacks to validate the impact of each vulnerability found.

process.title: Detailed Report
process.description: Executive + technical report with severity, evidence and step-by-step remediation plan.

process.title: Remediation & Re-test
process.description: We support the fix and verify that each vulnerability was closed.

useCases.problem: Fintech platform with sensitive data had never had a security audit.
useCases.solution: Full web + API + infra pentesting. 50+ vulnerabilities identified including 3 critical.
useCases.result: All vulnerabilities remediated in 2 weeks. Security certification obtained.

useCases.problem: E-commerce suffered a breach attempt via SQL injection in checkout form.
useCases.solution: Emergency audit, WAF hardening, code review and team training.
useCases.result: Zero breaches post-remediation. Security pipeline integrated into CI/CD.

ctaSection.title: Is your system really secure?
ctaSection.description: Schedule a free security assessment. We identify vulnerabilities before others do.

hero.title: APIs & Integrations
hero.subtitle: We connect your systems with robust APIs, MCP servers and microservice architectures. Everything talks to everything.

features.title: REST & GraphQL APIs

features.title: MCP Servers

features.title: ETL & Data Pipelines

process.title: API Design
process.description: We define contracts, schemas, authentication and versioning before writing code.

process.title: Implementation

process.title: Integration Testing
process.description: End-to-end testing with mocks, contract testing and edge case validation.

process.title: Monitoring & Docs
process.description: Health check dashboard, alerts and interactive documentation for your team.

useCases.problem: Company with 5 siloed systems: CRM, ERP, e-commerce, warehouse and accounting.
useCases.solution: Central API Gateway + integration microservices. Bidirectional real-time sync.
useCases.result: Unified operations, manual errors -90%, order processing time -70%.

useCases.problem: Startup needed to connect their platform with 12 different payment providers.
useCases.solution: Abstraction layer with per-provider adapters. Unified webhook + monitoring dashboard.
useCases.result: 12 integrations in 3 weeks. New provider onboarding in 2 days vs 2 weeks.

ctaSection.title: Need to connect your systems?
ctaSection.description: We design APIs and integrations that scale. From a webhook to a full microservice architecture.

hero.title: Legacy Code Modernization
hero.subtitle: Give new life to old systems. We migrate COBOL, FORTRAN and legacy applications to modern technologies.

features.title: COBOL Migration
features.description: Transformation of mainframe systems to Java, .NET or modern microservices.

features.title: FORTRAN to Python
features.description: Modernization of scientific code preserving critical business logic.

features.title: Legacy Maintenance
features.description: Support and incremental improvements on systems that can't be migrated yet.

features.title: Integration APIs
features.description: We expose legacy functionality as modern APIs for new applications.

features.title: Reverse Documentation
features.description: We document undocumented systems to facilitate future migrations.

features.description: We create test suites for code without coverage before modifying.

process.title: Code Archaeology
process.description: Deep system analysis: dependencies, flows, hidden business logic.

process.title: Migration Strategy
process.description: We define approach: strangler fig, big bang, or hybrid based on risk.

process.title: Abstraction Layer
process.description: We create interfaces that allow coexistence of legacy and new code.

process.title: Incremental Migration
process.description: We move functionality module by module with continuous validation.

process.title: Decommission
process.description: We retire legacy system only when new system is 100% validated.

useCases.problem: Bank with 30-year-old COBOL core banking, impossible to hire maintainers.
useCases.solution: Progressive migration to Java microservices with strangler fig pattern.
useCases.result: 50% of system migrated in 18 months, new features 10x faster.

useCases.problem: Manufacturing company with FORTRAN system for engineering calculations.
useCases.solution: Rewrite in Python with NumPy preserving numerical precision and exhaustive validation.
useCases.result: Maintainable code, integration with modern tools, 5x faster.

ctaSection.title: Have problematic legacy systems?
ctaSection.description: We evaluate your old code and propose the optimal modernization strategy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP. How we collect, use and protect your information.
privacy.contact: For privacy inquiries, contact us at:

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content:
We collect information you provide directly when you:

- Complete the contact form (name, email address, estimated budget, project description)
- Interact with our chat assistant (conversation messages)
- Communicate with us via email, WhatsApp or Upwork

We also automatically collect technical data such as IP address, browser type, pages visited and time spent using standard analytics tools.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content:
We use the collected information to:

- Respond to your quote requests and inquiries
- Provide contracted software development services
- Improve the browsing experience on our site
- Send communications related to active projects
- Analyze website usage to improve our services

We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content:
Our site uses essential cookies for site functionality (language preference, visual theme) and analytics cookies to understand how the site is used.

You can disable cookies from your browser settings. Essential cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the site.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content:
We use the following services that may process data:

- Vercel: frontend hosting
- Supabase: database and authentication
- Resend: transactional email delivery
- Anthropic: chat assistant query processing

Each provider operates under their own privacy policies and complies with industry security standards.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.content:
Our chat assistant uses AI models (Anthropic Claude) to answer queries. Messages you send to the chat may be processed by these models to generate responses.

We do not use your chat conversations to train AI models. Conversations are temporarily stored to maintain session context and are periodically deleted.

security.title: Data Security
security.content:
We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information, including:

- SSL/TLS encryption for all communications
- Restricted access to personal data
- Secure server infrastructure (AWS)
- Continuous security monitoring

No internet transmission is 100% secure, but we strive to protect your information with the best available practices.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content:
You have the right to:

- Access the personal information we hold about you
- Request correction of inaccurate data
- Request deletion of your personal data
- Object to the processing of your data
- Request portability of your data

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at founder@soulcore.dev.

international.title: International Transfers
international.content:
SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP operates from the Dominican Republic with global remote service. Your data may be processed on servers located in the United States (AWS, Vercel, Supabase).

For European Union users, these transfers are made under adequate protection mechanisms in accordance with the GDPR.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect information from minors. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with the update date. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP services.
terms.contact: For legal inquiries, contact us at:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content:
By accessing and using soulcore.dev and the services of SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP, you accept these terms of service in their entirety. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you must not use our services.

These terms apply to all visitors, users and clients of the website and services.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content:
SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP offers services in:

- Custom software development (web, mobile, APIs)
- Artificial intelligence and automation
- Cybersecurity and pentesting
- Integrations and APIs
- Digital design and UX
- E-commerce and digital marketing
- Technology consulting and mentoring
- Data science and analytics
- Cloud and DevOps
- Legacy system modernization
- Industrial automation and IoT

We also offer proprietary products and frameworks (VMOF, SOUL CORE MCP, SOUL_CORE) subject to specific license terms.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content:
All website content, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, software, source code, frameworks and materials, is the property of SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP or its licensors and is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws.

The proprietary frameworks VMOF, SOUL CORE MCP and SOUL_CORE are trademarks and products of SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP. Their use requires an express license.

Code developed specifically for a client is governed by the terms of each project's individual contract.

userObligations.title: User Obligations
userObligations.content:
By using our services you agree to:

- Provide truthful and up-to-date information
- Not use the site for illegal or unauthorized purposes
- Not attempt to access restricted areas of the site or its systems
- Not reverse engineer our products or services
- Not submit malicious, offensive content or content that infringes third-party rights
- Respect the intellectual property of SOUL CORE and its clients

payments.title: Payments and Billing
payments.content:
Development services are quoted individually based on project complexity. Payment terms are established in each project's contract and may include:

- Advance payment (partial or full)
- Milestone-based payments
- Hourly or per-sprint rates

Quotes are valid for 30 days. Store product prices are those published at the time of purchase. All prices are expressed in USD unless otherwise indicated.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content:
SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP shall not be liable for:

- Indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of our services
- Loss of data, profits or business interruption
- Errors or inaccuracies in website content
- Actions of third parties or failures in third-party services

Our maximum liability in any case shall be limited to the amount paid by the client in the 12 months prior to the incident.

warranties.title: Warranties
warranties.content:
Services are provided "as is" and "as available". We make no implied warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose regarding the website.

For contracted projects, specific warranties are established in each project's individual contract. We generally offer a post-delivery bug-fix warranty period as agreed.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content:
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to our services if:

- These terms of service are violated
- Fraudulent or malicious activity is detected
- Agreed payment obligations are not met

Termination of contracted projects is governed by the terms of the corresponding individual contract.

governing.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governing.content:
These terms are governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any dispute shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of the National District, Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.

For international clients, international arbitration may be agreed under the rules of the Mediation and Arbitration Center of the Santo Domingo Chamber of Commerce and Production.

changes.title: Modifications
changes.content:
SOUL CORE DEVELOPERS GROUP reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect upon being posted on this page.

For active projects, agreed contractual terms prevail over any subsequent changes to these general terms.
